question: What time should I arrive at the ceremony?
Is there parking available at the wedding venue?
answer: Yes! There is a large parking lot to accommodate guests.

question: Will there be transportation from the hotels to the venue and back?
answer: Unfortunately there will be no shuttles.

question: Can I bring a plus one?
answer: Unfortunately we cannot accommodate additional guests not indicated on your invitation. Rest assured, we are arranging seating with care to ensure you're surrounded by friends.

question: Are kids welcome?
answer: While we love little ones, we kindly request a child-free wedding.

question: I have a food allergy, can I make a special request?
answer: Yes! When you RSVP, you will be asked if you have any dietary restrictions.

question: Who can I contact with any additional questions?
answer: Please reach out to Emily Turner at (734) 802-8197.
